blocks.content: Eli found out that same night, from Kit, in the kitchen, while the girls were in the other room.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: We figured it out.
Eli turned from the counter very slowly.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Define figured it out.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I asked her. She said yes.
Eli set down what he was holding.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Kit McKinley.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Don't.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: I have been watching you not do this for six years.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I know.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Six. Years.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I know, Eli.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: I told you at the bike rack. I told you at homecoming. I told you at prom —

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: You were right every time. Are you done.
Eli picked up what he'd set down. Looked at Kit.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Genuinely proud of you, man.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Thank you.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: She's going to wreck you if you're not careful.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Already has. Multiple times.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Good. That's how you know it's real.
They went back to the living room. On the couch, Daisy was talking to Meilin about something, and when Kit came back she shifted slightly and he sat down next to her.
